# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report vulnerabilities by opening a [security advisory](https://github.com/pirateape/apeguard-action/security/advisories/new) on GitHub.

For critical issues, contact the maintainer directly via the repository's [security tab](https://github.com/pirateape/apeguard-action/security).

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.
